treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient is in stable rhythm, with preserved biventricular systolic function post-surgery

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented for outpatient stress test due to chest pain
Cardiac catheterization revealed multivessel coronary disease

patient_outcome.final_status: Alert and oriented x3, ambulating with steady gait
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up appointment with surgeon for driving clearance discussed
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Incisional pain managed with oral analgesia
